Package jsim.api

Enum Class RobotId

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<RobotId>
jsim.api.RobotId
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<RobotId>, Constable
public enum RobotId extends Enum<RobotId>
Identifies a robot by its FRC alliance and driver-station number (1–3).

Use this with SimBodyBuilder.robotId(RobotId) when creating a robot body, and with SimWorld.findRobot(RobotId) to retrieve it by station later.

Example: 


 SimBody robot = world.addBody(new SimBodyBuilder("Red1Robot")
     .robotId(RobotId.RED_1)
     .mass(54).boxCollider(0.45, 0.4, 0.15)
     .material(Material.CARPET));

 Elsewhere in simulationPeriodic():
 SimBody red1 = world.findRobot(RobotId.RED_1);

    • valueOf

      public static RobotId valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • of

      public static RobotId of(RobotId.Alliance alliance, int station)
      Look up a RobotId from an alliance and station number.
      Parameters:
      alliance - RED or BLUE
      station - 1, 2, or 3
      Returns:
      the matching RobotId
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if station is not 1–3
